nodes.title: How to test
widgets_values:
Manual test for SAX Text Catalog:

1. Click [📖 Manage Texts...] button — Manager Dialog should open with 3 items.
2. Verify Relation 1 = scene_day, Relation 2 = neg_default.
3. Verify Relation 3 shows '(unset)' (gray).
4. Verify Relation 4 shows '<orphan>' with warning color (refers to deleted 'ghost').
5. Verify Relation 5 = scene_night with toggle OFF (text rendered semi-transparent, output is empty string).
6. Click the leading toggle pill on any row to flip ON/OFF — the text fades / restores accordingly.
7. Edit a Relation by clicking ✎ and pick a different item.
8. In the Editor, try [+ LoRA] / [+ Wildcard] buttons to insert syntax at the cursor.
9. Save workflow, reload — toggle states should restore.
10. Right-click the node — '📖 Manage Texts...' should appear in menu.
